summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of The Drop news aggregator app. All core functionality working perfectly with 26 articles, GPT-5.2 rewrites, age group themes, and full navigation flow.

design_issues.issue: Some category tabs (world, science) not visible in horizontal scroll - may need scroll behavior check

passed_tests: ✅ All 10 backend API endpoints (categories, users, articles, stats)
✅ Splash screen → onboarding → feed navigation flow
✅ Article feed loading with 20 news cards
✅ Article detail page with rewrites and navigation
✅ Theme switching between kids (light) and teens (dark)
✅ Profile page with age group switching functionality
✅ Data-testid attributes on all interactive elements

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor display issue with category tabs)
